title: Mosaic Stock: The Time To Invest Has Not Yet Come
text: The Mosaic Company revenue totaled $3604 mln (-8% y/y), missing our forecast of $3933 mln by 8%. The difference was driven by lower revenue in the potash fertilizer segment. The company's EBITDA totaled $777 mln (-46% y/y), compared with our forecast of $920 bln.

title: Bear of the Day: Mosaic (MOS)
text: Analysts are bearish on the fertilizers.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for May 10th
text: BCBP, FNF and MOS have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on May 10, 2023.

title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Mosaic Action List Buy Recommendation
text: Fintel reports that on May 8, 2023, Goldman Sachs maintained coverage of Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Action List Buy recommendation.

title: Mosaic Co (MOS) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Mosaic Co (NYSE:MOS ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Paul Massoud - VP, IR James O'Rourke - CEO, President & Director Clint Freeland - SVP & CFO Jenny Wang - SVP, Global Strategic Marketing and Head of China & India Conference Call Participants Christopher Parkinson - Mizuho Securities Stephen Byrne - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Benjamin Theurer - Barclays Bank Andrew Wong - RBC Capital Markets Richard Garchitorena - Wells Fargo Securities Vincent Andrews - Morgan Stanley Jeffrey Zekauskas - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Edlain Rodriguez - Crédit Suisse Joel Jackson - BMO Capital Markets Lucas Beaumont - UBS Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Mosaic Company's First Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions].

title: Mosaic's (MOS) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat
text: Net sales of Mosaic (MOS) decline roughly 8.1% in Q1 on lower sales across the segments.

title: Mosaic (MOS) Q1 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Mosaic (MOS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Mosaic (MOS) Lags Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Mosaic (MOS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.14 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.28 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.41 per share a year ago.

title: Mosaic Announces Dates for First Quarter 2023 Results and Conference Call
text: TAMPA, FL / ACCESSWIRE / May 3, 2023 / The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) plans to release first quarter 2023 earnings results on Wednesday, May 3, 2023, after close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The company will issue a news wire alert when earnings materials are publicly available on the company's website.
